class.name: soccer_hardware/MinibotSimHardware
class.description: Simulation hardware interface for MiniBot. Integrates the single neck_pan joint with a simple second-order model and synthesizes IMU readings. Stands in for the Isaac/Mujoco HardwareInterface in sim-to-real testing.

class.name: soccer_hardware/MinibotSerialHardware
class.description: Real hardware interface for MiniBot. Streams position/effort commands to the STM32/Teensy MCU over serial (CRC16-framed, mirroring soccer-firmware), reads back joint state + IMU, and faults if the MCU heartbeat goes silent.
